welcome.heading: Welcome to The AI Model Lab
welcome.body: Create stunning images, cinematic videos and digital influencers with AI — all in one place. Let us give you a quick tour.

tutorials.heading: Platform tutorials
tutorials.body: This button opens the platform tutorials. Learn how to generate images, videos and create your AI Influencer.

finish.heading: All set. Let's create!
finish.body: Open the "Generate image" panel, write your prompt and create your first AI image :D
